summary: Iteration 8 testing completed - Phase 2 (AI Command Center) fully functional. All 36 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend AI Command Center working correctly with chat, clarifying questions, sidebar, and all 8 agents displayed. Fixed login redirect to /ai.
critical_code_review_comments: Unified Agent Framework: All 8 agents registered correctly (Orchestrator, Research, Outreach, Optimization, Intelligence, Knowledge, Workflow, Qualification)
AI Chat endpoint: Returns plan or clarification based on request complexity - acts like a PM asking clarifying questions
Plan approval/rejection flow: approvePlanId and rejectPlanId parameters working correctly
Quick action endpoint: Executes single agent tasks without plan approval
WebSocket connection for real-time activity updates working
Frontend AI Command Center: Full-screen chat interface with sidebar toggle
Sidebar has Activity, History, Settings tabs with all 8 agents listed

success_rate.frontend: 100% (AI Command Center loads, chat works, sidebar works)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 2 (AI Command Center) fully tested. AI Command Center at /ai is now the primary interface. Login redirects to /ai. Key endpoints: GET /api/ai/agents (returns 8 agents), POST /api/ai/chat (main chat with plan/clarification), GET /api/ai/plans/pending, GET /api/ai/plans/active, POST /api/ai/quick-action, POST /api/ai/suggest. WebSocket at /api/ai/ws/{user_id} for real-time updates. Frontend has full-screen chat with sidebar toggle showing Activity, History, Settings tabs.

frontend: AI Command Center page loads at /ai - PASS
AI responds with helpful information - PASS
AI asks clarifying questions for complex requests - PASS
Suggested action click fills input - PASS

unified_agent_framework.details: 8 specialized agents: Orchestrator, Research, Outreach, Optimization, Intelligence, Knowledge, Workflow, Qualification

ai_chat_endpoint.details: Returns plan or clarification based on request complexity. Maintains session context.

clarifying_questions.details: AI asks clarifying questions before creating plans (like a PM)

plan_approval_flow.details: approvePlanId and rejectPlanId parameters work correctly

quick_action.details: Executes single agent tasks without plan approval

websocket_activity.details: WebSocket connection established for real-time activity updates

frontend_ai_command_center.details: Full-screen chat interface with sidebar toggle, all 8 agents displayed

login_redirect.details: Login now redirects to /ai instead of /dashboard

mocked_apis.sendgrid: SendGrid email sending is MOCKED - placeholder API key in backend/.env
